typecheck.command: xcodebuild build-for-testing -project OpenBurnBar.xcodeproj -scheme OpenBurnBar -destination "platform=macOS,arch=arm64" -clonedSourcePackagesDirPath .spm-cache -derivedDataPath .derived-data/ci-typecheck CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO

blockingIssues.description: UI handoff coverage remains non-actionable: tests instantiate views but do not assert rendered state transitions or UI indicator propagation proving Settings → Dashboard/Popover visibility behavior.
Launch chaining still is not exercised through browser/CLI launch adapters; tests include hypothetical comments instead of invoking launch services with assertions on final-profile routing.
Error CTA routing checks only control presence and do not execute CTA interactions or assert onOpenSettings/navigation side effects required by VAL-CROSS-008.
Startup/sync secret-safety is still not validated via captured runtime logs; current test approach uses in-memory redactor calls and does not verify actual logging outputs.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require explicit evidence artifacts for cross-surface hardening (UI interaction traces, launch invocation traces, and runtime log-capture/redaction assertions) before allowing followedProcedure=true.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Round 2 fix feature still reported followedProcedure=true while missing launch/log/UI trace evidence expected by skill step 6.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: State that VAL-CROSS evidence must include actionable flow assertions (tap/callback/navigation and launch invocation outcomes), not only UI text presence or store-state checks.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review found repeated pattern of static presence/store assertions that did not satisfy VAL-CROSS-004/006/008/009 behavioral traces.
